reasoning: Your current limiter is a 9.3% decline between your 5-min and 20-min power outputs. This indicates poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, crucial for the sustained efforts on the Alpine Loop climb. After a lighter ride yesterday, this workout will enhance your ability to maintain higher power levels with efficient lactate management.
